TaskDefinition.name: Ascension-TaskDefinition-PopulateGCPGroupOwnership
TaskDefinition.Description: A task to populate Ownership for GCP Entitlements.

Argument.helpKey: List of GCP Entitlements seperated by comma(,); eg. entitlement1,entitlement2,entitlement3
Argument.name: entitlementList
Argument.Prompt: List of GCP Entitlements seperated by comma(,)

Argument.name: numberOfInputRecords
Argument.Prompt: Number of Entitlements Received as Input

Argument.name: numberOfFilteredEntitlements
Argument.Prompt: Number of GCP Entitlements without Ownership

Argument.name: entitlementsFiltered
Argument.Prompt: List of GCP Entitlements without Ownership

Argument.name: numberOfUpdatedEntitlements
Argument.Prompt: Number of GCP Entitlements updated with Ownership

Argument.name: entitlementsUpdated
Argument.Prompt: List of GCP Entitlements updated with Ownership

Argument.name: numberOfUpdateFailedEntitlements
Argument.Prompt: Number of GCP Entitlements with Ownership update failed

Argument.name: entitlementsUpdateFailed
Argument.Prompt: List of GCP Entitlements updated with Ownership update failed
